# PERF-044 negative: a single type assertion is reused
lang: go
file: PERF-044-safe.go
---
package sample

type anyVal interface{ Value() int }

type intVal int

func (i intVal) Value() int { return int(i) }

func Handler(v anyVal) int {
	concrete := v.(intVal)
	return concrete.Value() + concrete.Value()
}
